cards.title: Arrays
cards.governance_note: Document index semantics, bounds, units, capacity, and memory behavior.

cards.title: Lists
cards.governance_note: Clarify sequence meaning, traversal behavior, insertion rules, and provenance.

cards.title: Stacks
cards.governance_note: Audit recency assumptions, undo behavior, nested context, and underflow.

cards.title: Queues
cards.governance_note: Audit fairness, service order, backpressure, overflow, and escalation policy.
